title: Smile CLI Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands for using the Smile CLI tool effectively.

commands.scenario: Use when starting a new project with Smile to set up the initial configuration.
Use to compile and prepare your Smile project for deployment.
Use to execute your Smile project on your local machine for testing.

commands.description: Run tests for the Smile project.
commands.scenario: Use to execute all tests and ensure your Smile project is working correctly.

commands.description: Deploy the Smile project to a server.
commands.scenario: Use to upload and deploy your Smile project to a live server.

commands.description: Clean up build artifacts in the Smile project.
commands.scenario: Use to remove temporary files and directories created during the build process.

commands.description: Set a configuration key-value pair for the Smile project.
commands.scenario: Use to update or add configuration settings for your project.

commands.description: Get the value of a configuration key in the Smile project.
commands.scenario: Use to retrieve current configuration values for verification or debugging.

commands.description: View logs for the Smile project.
commands.scenario: Use to check logs for debugging or monitoring purposes.

commands.description: Display the current version of the Smile CLI tool.
commands.scenario: Use to verify the installed version of Smile CLI for compatibility checks.

commands.description: Display help information for Smile CLI commands.
commands.scenario: Use to get detailed usage instructions for Smile CLI commands.

commands.description: Update the Smile CLI tool to the latest version.
commands.scenario: Use to ensure you have the latest features and bug fixes for Smile CLI.
